prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTD2056VK turbocharger** (hybrid variant with billet compressor wheel, 60mm inducer, and 76mm exducer) for the **4G-CGSB 3.0L V6 TDI (EA897evo)** engine, paired with a **DMS Automotive Stage 3 ECU remap** (targeting 420hp/900Nm with 2.2bar boost, optimized for 102 RON fuel and revised EGR/DPF delete via **RaceChip Pro 2.0** bypass module).

Install a **Wagner Tuning Competition intercooler** (front-mount, 100% aluminum, 4.5L core volume, 60mm thick) with **Silicone Intakes V2 charge pipes** (reinforced 4-ply aramid, 76mm ID) and **034 Motorsport billet aluminum intercooler end tanks** to eliminate heat soak under sustained 3rd-gear pulls.

Replace the stock **ZF 8HP70X** transmission with a **Spool Performance Stage 3 valve body** (revised shift logic for 150ms upshifts, reinforced torque converter with **Sonax friction modifier**), paired with a **034 Motorsport transmission mount insert** (80A polyurethane) and **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch** (ceramic-metallic, 850Nm torque capacity) for the **quattro ultra** AWD system.
estetica: **Rieger Tuning RS7-style widebody kit** (carbon fiber front fenders with 30mm extended wheel arches, rear quarter panels with integrated diffuser, and **Audi Sport OEM-spec paint-matched finish** in Nardo Grey), paired with **Vorsteiner V-FF107 21x10.5 ET35 forged wheels** (matte black, 5x112 PCD, 285/30R21 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires).

**AWE Track Edition exhaust system** (dual 3.5" T304 stainless steel tips, resonated center section, and **valvetronic bypass** for 95dB on-demand sound), combined with a **Milltek Sport de-cat downpipe** (200-cell race cat, 3" diameter) and **APR Carbon Fiber rear diffuser** (with integrated LED reverse lights).

**OEM+ Euro-spec lighting upgrade**: **Hella 3R HID projectors** (6000K, 35W ballasts) in the stock headlight housings, **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes** (RGBW, 1200lm), and **Osram Night Breaker Laser H7 bulbs** for high beams, paired with **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** (5000K, 3000lm) and a **Vagbremtechnic LED taillight retrofit** (smoked lenses, sequential turn signals).
